name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: Honored to have been elected as the Vice Chair of the @EdLaborCmte in the 117th Congress.  Education has the power to change the world, and I look forward to bringing my 20 years of experience in public education as we work to pass transformative policies.  https://t.co/j6836t8w4d

name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: Our condolences and prayers go out to the loved ones of Rep. Ron Wright, his staff, and the constituents of the 6th District of Texas who have lost a dedicated public servant.

name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: Reducing the income cutoff for survival checks to $50,000 is totally unacceptable.  That would exclude some 90,000 workers in #NY16 from this urgently-needed relief.  We need to get people relief NOW.

name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: We need to be sending out $2,000 checks each month to every American.

name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: It's now been one month since white supremacists attacked the Capitol.  We still need answers.  How and why they were able to get inside? Did they have ties to our law enforcement?  We need to pass my bill, the COUP Act, and create a 9/11-style commission to investigate.

name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: The #COVID19 pandemic has further exposed our need for a #PaidLeave policy.  Only 5% of our essential, low-wage workers have access to paid leave through their employer. We need to pass the comprehensive and inclusive #FAMILYAct to change that.  https://t.co/OwaHt0Fcj9

name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: I'm glad to support @SenMarkey and @RepHuffman's bill to protect the Arctic National Wildlife Refuge.  This is not only about the climate crisis. It is about defending Indigenous rights.

name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: Education is about liberation, not oppression.  I'm proud to join @RepPressley and our colleagues in calling on @POTUS to cancel $50,000 in federal student debt.

name: Congressman Jamaal Bowman
tweet: Our district has seen firsthand the effects of climate change and environmental racism, from pollution causing high rates of asthma to our disproportionate proximity to toxic waste.  I support @POTUS' efforts to center environmental justice and bring about a sustainable future.

tweet: The horrors of the Holocaust must remain top of mind — over 6 million Jewish lives were taken in the genocide.  In the words of Elie Wiesel, we must “swear never to be silent whenever and wherever human beings endure suffering and humiliation." 2/2

tweet: Thank you to everyone who has reached out to check in. Myself and my staff are safe and sheltering.  What we are seeing right now is fascism, fueled by white supremacy—the logical extension of our failure to reconcile our history.  Everyone please stay safe.
